response.original_title: Caroline Polachek Live at Sydney Opera House
response.overview: Caroline Polachek, a singularity in the music world and a queen of experimental pop, delivered her first-ever Australian performance, captivating the audience at the Sydney Opera House Concert Hall. This much-anticipated event was part of her The Spiraling Tour, timed perfectly with the success of her latest album, Desire, I Want To Turn Into You. Renowned for her shimmering voice and innovative sound, Polachek's concert was a display of her evolution from the ethereal, crystalline vibes of her 2019 album Pang to the more physical, tone-poetic explorations of her recent work.
response.tagline: DESIRE I WANNA TURN INTO YOU
response.title: Caroline Polachek Live at Sydney Opera House
